name: Rheumatoid Arthritis
definition: An autoimmune disease mainly affecting joints
etiology: Genetic factors, environmental factors, immune dysregulation, infectious factors
symptoms: Joint swelling and pain, morning stiffness, joint deformity, systemic symptoms
treatment_principles: Relieve symptoms, control disease progression, protect joint function, improve quality of life
prevention_advice: Avoid cold and dampness, moderate exercise, protect joints, early diagnosis and treatment
